project: Balloon Color Planner v2 - Shopify Dawn Pattern
problems_solved: Clicking thumbnail → nothing obvious → immediate photo update

html.rationale: Accessible, keyboard-navigable, no JS required for basic form

css.philosophy: CSS handles all visual states, minimal JS
patterns: Input:checked + label selector for active states
Border and box-shadow for visual feedback

javascript.philosophy: Form handling only, no DOM manipulation for visuals
responsibilities: Render radio inputs + labels from ARRANGEMENTS and PALETTE data
Update image src and arrangement name

changes: Hidden radio inputs + visible label swatches

key_elements.summary: Hidden div, shown when selections made

approach: Loop ARRANGEMENTS, create input + label pairs
Loop PALETTE, create input + label pairs
Update image src, arrangement name, summary on change

functions.renderArrangements(): Create radio + label for each arrangement
functions.renderColors(): Create radio + label for each color
functions.copyToClipboard(): Copy to clipboard with visual feedback

js/arrangements-photo.js.format: Array of objects: { id, name, thumb, photo }

step_1_page_load.html: Form renders with all arrangements as radio inputs

step_2_user_clicks_arrangement.css: Label shows pink border + shadow immediately
step_2_user_clicks_arrangement.js: onChange fires → updates image src, name, summary
step_2_user_clicks_arrangement.result: Large photo updates, arrangement name shows

step_3_user_clicks_color.css: Color swatch shows pink border immediately
step_3_user_clicks_color.result: Order summary updates with color name + swatch

technical_decisions.why_radio_buttons: Semantic HTML, keyboard accessible, native form support, no custom event handling needed
technical_decisions.why_css_checked: Instant visual feedback, no JS needed for styling, works without JavaScript
technical_decisions.why_two_variables: Tracks user selections for summary and copy function
technical_decisions.why_no_web_components: Simpler than Shopify (they use <product-form>), not needed for this use case

deployment.option_b: Keep both: v1 at /index-photo.html, v2 at /index-photo-v2.html
deployment.option_c: Set v2 as default: Update links, keep v1 as fallback
